construct_verdict_reason: Most items validly measure subjective wellbeing dimensions, but one item measures emotional state rather than self-assessed quality of life or satisfaction.

items.reason: Directly measures self-assessed quality of life, a core evaluative dimension of subjective wellbeing.
Directly measures life satisfaction, a central evaluative component of subjective wellbeing.
Directly measures enjoyment of life, an affective dimension of subjective wellbeing explicitly mentioned in the construct description.
Directly measures sexual satisfaction, explicitly included in the construct description as part of subjective wellbeing.

Measures momentary emotional state (feeling calm and tranquil) rather than self-assessed quality of life, life satisfaction, or enjoyment—a transient affective experience distinct from the evaluative wellbeing construct.
